_comment: Servy 7.8 pre-built binary manifest for airgap-cpp-devkit. Windows-only tool. The portable .7z is under 100MB and stored as a single file in prebuilt-binaries. SHA256 covers the whole file.

tool.name: servy
tool.runtime: self-contained (.NET 10.0 embedded -- no runtime install required)

installer._note: Full installer. Not used by setup.sh -- included for reference only.

contents.Servy.exe: GUI desktop application -- create and manage Windows services interactively
contents.Servy.Manager.exe: Manager app -- real-time monitoring of all installed Servy services
contents.servy-cli.exe: CLI -- scriptable service management for CI/CD and automation
contents.Servy.psm1: PowerShell module -- place alongside servy-cli.exe for PS integration
contents.Servy.psd1: PowerShell module manifest -- required for module import in 7.8+
contents.taskschd/: Task Scheduler helpers for failure email/notification alerts
